This test checks definition over doc links for packages that are only present
in the forward dependency closure.

-- go.mod --
module example.com/doclinksforward

go 1.20

-- leaf/leaf.go --
package leaf

func Target() {} //@loc(Target, "Target")

-- mid/mid.go --
package mid

import "example.com/doclinksforward/leaf"

var _ = leaf.Target

-- mid/value.go --
package mid

const Value = 0

-- p.go --
package p

import "example.com/doclinksforward/mid"

var _ = mid.Value

// Work refers to [leaf.Target], but this file does not directly import leaf. //@def("Target", Target)
func Work() {}
